packageRules.description: Group Kubernetes client libraries so they move together and stay API-compatible. Auto-merge patch/minor after CI; major versions require manual review because k8s.io libs can carry breaking API changes across minor bumps.
Group golang.org/x libraries; auto-merge patch/minor after CI passes.
Group the TUI stack (charmbracelet + muesli) so updates land together. Stay manual: bubbletea/lipgloss v1->v2 is a breaking module-path change that needs code changes, not just a version bump.
Group cobra/pflag CLI stack; auto-merge patch/minor after CI passes.
Major version updates always require manual review (breaking changes). Override the :automergeMinor preset for safety.
